§6Hard Plastic§f

§aPost-bismuth engineering plastic — the key to catalytic converters, missiles, and advanced circuits!§f

Hard Plastic is a post-bismuth crafting material produced by combining §bBTX§f and §bPhosgene§f in the §bChemical Plant§f. It is used extensively in late-game recipes including the §bCatalytic Reformer§f, §bCatalytic Converter§f, advanced missiles, and high-tier circuit boards.

§6Production§f:
§b• Chemical Plant§f: §e500mB§f BTX + §e500mB§f Phosgene → §e1×§f Hard Plastic Bar (requires §bPolycarbonate Synthesis§f template).

§6Uses§f:
§b• Catalytic Converter§f: Required for the Catalytic Reformer and Hydrotreater.
§b• Circuits§f: Component in §bVersatile Circuit Board§f and other advanced circuits.
§b• Missiles§f: Used in various missile body and warhead recipes.
§b• Machinery§f: Component in many late-game HBM machines.

§eTip§f: Hard Plastic requires §bBismuth§f (for the BTX production chain) and §bChlorine§f (for Phosgene). It is a significant milestone — once you can produce it, you have access to the Catalytic Reformer and all the advanced refining chains it unlocks!
